summary: Completed testing of iOS bug fixes for PDF export, document preview, and isIOSDevice utility. All critical bugs verified as fixed. Backend PDF/DOCX export endpoints return valid files. Frontend compiles successfully. Document preview page correctly reads from localStorage only.
critical_code_review_comments: isIOSDevice utility correctly detects both traditional iOS UA strings AND iPadOS desktop UA (Macintosh + maxTouchPoints > 1)
DocumentPreviewPage now reads ONLY from localStorage (line 17), sessionStorage fallback removed
All 7 files correctly import and use isIOSDevice from '../utils/isIOS'
ReportsSection handleExportPDF uses isIOSDevice() for iOS-specific PDF handling (opens in new tab with session_token param)
ReportsSection handleExportDOCX uses isIOSDevice() for iOS-specific share functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS bug fixes verified: 1) isIOSDevice() utility created at /app/frontend/src/utils/isIOS.js - detects iPadOS desktop UA via Macintosh + maxTouchPoints > 1, 2) DocumentPreviewPage reads only from localStorage (sessionStorage fallback removed), 3) All 7 files (ReportView, DocumentPreviewPage, BarristerView, CaseDetail, ReportsSection, InstallPrompt, FormTemplates) correctly import and use isIOSDevice, 4) Backend PDF/DOCX export endpoints work correctly with session_token query param for iOS Safari

backend_health_check.details: API health endpoint returns healthy status

backend_pdf_export_quick_summary.details: Returns valid PDF (starts with %PDF magic bytes)

backend_pdf_export_with_session_token_pa.details: iOS Safari method (session_token as query param) works

backend_docx_export_quick_summary.details: Returns valid DOCX (ZIP archive starting with PK)

frontend_app_loads.details: App loads successfully at production URL

frontend_login_via_api.details: Login via API and localStorage token storage works

frontend_case_page_loads.details: Case page loads with title 'R v Perry'

frontend_reports_tab.details: Reports tab shows all 4 reports (Extensive Log, Full Detailed, Quick Summary, Barrister Brief)

frontend_report_view_page.details: Report view page loads with Print, Export Word, Export PDF buttons

frontend_document_preview_page.details: Document preview page loads successfully with localStorage payload, iframe renders content

isIOSDevice_utility_imports.details: All 7 files correctly import isIOSDevice from '../utils/isIOS'

frontend_compiles.details: yarn build completes successfully without errors

sessionStorage_removal.change: Removed sessionStorage fallback, now reads only from localStorage (line 17)
